## Apple sets new all-time closing and intraday highs on a broad tech down day

AAPL printing all-time highs during a tech selloff is a high-conviction divergence signal; whether driven by index mechanics, rotation into perceived defensive mega-cap, or a genuine handset-share re-rating determines how to read the sustainability of the move.

- AAPL hit simultaneous new all-time closing and intraday record highs.
- Price milestone occurred against a backdrop of broader tech sector weakness.
- No specific catalyst stated in this headline; aligns with iPhone share-gain narrative in concurrent coverage.
- ATH on a down-tech day amplifies the AAPL/sector divergence story developing across today's headlines.
